case_title: JONATHAN DAVID MELROD VS. SUNSET HEIGHTS ASSOCATION OF RESPONSIBLE PEOPLE

docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF AUG-07-2015 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF AUG-07-2015 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. PLAINTIFF WAS PRESENT. DEFENDANT WAS PRESENT. DEFENDANT WAS REPRESENTED BY JEREMY FRIEDLANDER--VOLUNTEER; MEMBER OF BOARD OF DIRECTORS. DEFENDANT WAIVES SERVICE IN COURT TODAY. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY DEFENDANT SUNSET HEIGHTS ASSOCATION OF RESPONSIBLE PEOPLE
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF AUG-07-2015 - JUDGMENT.

MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $3,400.00 FILED BY MELROD, JONATHAN DAVID AS TO DEFENDANT SUNSET HEIGHTS ASSOCATION OF RESPONSIBLE PEOPLE ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR AUG-07-2015 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506

PARTIES WAIVE SERVICE ON PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM. THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF MELROD, JONATHAN DAVID IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT SUNSET HEIGHTS ASSOCATION OF RESPONSIBLE PEOPLE STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
